name: Add Footer with Navigation and Contact Columns
prompt: Add a footer to my homepage with two columns: one called 'Navigate' with links to Home (/) and About (/about), and one called 'Get in Touch' that shows our email support@freshbread.com.

setup.content:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Fresh Bread Daily"
  subheading="Baked with love every morning."
/>

checks.judge: A Footer component with a 'Navigate' column containing Home and About links and a 'Get in Touch' column displaying the email address is added to the homepage, and the page's frontmatter sets hideFooter: true so the site's automatic settings-driven footer is suppressed and exactly one footer appears; the Hero section is fully preserved.

dry_run.text: I've added a footer to your homepage with a 'Navigate' column linking to Home and About, and a 'Get in Touch' column showing your email address, while keeping the existing hero intact.

edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome"
pageLayout: "full"
hideFooter: true
---
<Hero
  heading="Fresh Bread Daily"
  subheading="Baked with love every morning."
/>

<Footer
  columns={[
    { title: "Navigate", links: [{ label: "Home", href: "/" }, { label: "About", href: "/about" }] },
    { title: "Get in Touch", links: [{ label: "support@freshbread.com", href: "mailto:support@freshbread.com" }] }
  ]}
/>
